title: Paralegals and Legal Assistants
description: Assist lawyers by investigating facts, preparing legal documents, or researching legal precedent. Conduct research to support a legal proceeding, to formulate a defense, or to initiate legal action.

tasks.text: Prepare affidavits or other documents, such as legal correspondence, and organize and maintain documents in paper or electronic filing system.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare, edit, or review legal documents, including legislation, briefs, pleadings, appeals, wills, contracts, and real estate closing statements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Investigate facts and law of cases and search pertinent sources, such as public records and internet sources, to determine causes of action and to prepare cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare for trial by performing tasks such as organizing exhibits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with clients and other professionals to discuss details of cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Gather and analyze research data, such as statutes, decisions, and legal articles, codes, and documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate law office activity, including delivery of subpoenas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Call upon witnesses to testify at hearings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arbitrate disputes between parties and assist in the real estate closing process, such as by reviewing title searches.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Appraise and inventory real and personal property for estate planning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep and monitor legal volumes to ensure that the law library is up-to-date.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
